mapper.insert: insert into customer_info ( mailAddress, password, name, nameKana, gender, jushoPref, jusho1, jusho2, created_at, created_by, update_at, update_by, delete_flg) values( #{mailAddress}, #{password}, #{name}, #{nameKana}, #{gender}, #{jushoPref}, #{jusho1}, #{jusho2}, #{created_at}, #{created_by}, #{update_at}, #{update_by}, #{delete_flg});
